title: Atlas Opens the Way Forward
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Marines, Dorry, Bonney as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You marines are gonna be in hot water for letting me get away, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA G

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You look pretty beaten up, Kash!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: OIMO!! Kashill!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sami here!! We've successfully set off, Nami! How's it looking up there?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We'll be right behind you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Straw hat!! I've been itching to see you again!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll be able to launch into the ocean thanks to Edison...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we may need you guys to help us land safely!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course!! Nami-san, Robin-chan, and lilith-chan are my top priority!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if you sink, nothing could stop me from rescuing you ladies!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why not Save Every- One?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'll make sure the ship isn't damaged!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Stop forgetting the rest of us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Something's coming from above the island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Another elder!!! They're really coming after us now, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OH MY!! YOU MUST BE STRAW HAT Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The captains warned me about your appetite, that's why I had a bunch of food ready!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I wasn't planning on serving this all in one go...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry!! I gotta fill up now; just cook some more for later!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: gogya gya! You really eat a lot, dontcha?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: RWAWR!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Protect the Little People!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So hot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: UWAAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: BOORN! SIG!! You guys hanging in there?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Put out the flames!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: We can't let the sails catch fire!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Is that a bird monster?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I owe you one!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's blistering!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Thanks for having our backs, Giants!!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Let's move vegapunk and daddy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: They'll burn!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'll carry them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Guess there's no ignoring these monsters!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they can fly, they can chase us to the ends of the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Not a single one of you...

dialogue.speaker: Atlas
dialogue.text: ...will be permitted to escape!!

summary: This part advances the Escape from Egghead through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
